USER.naming_rule: Do not create a custom label with the same name as a system label.

message_label_rules: Labels are applied to messages; thread label views reflect labels present on messages in the thread.
A label applied to one message is associated with that message and its thread, not necessarily every message in the thread.
Labels cannot be applied to draft messages.
When a thread label is applied, newly added messages in the thread do not automatically inherit that prior label operation.
